description_long: This is a life-sized representation of a giant panda, characterized by its distinctive black and white fur pattern. The animal stands upright on its hind legs, with black fur covering its arms, legs, shoulders, and eye patches, while the rest of its body is covered in white fur. The head is rounded with small, rounded ears and prominent black eye patches, giving it a gentle and recognizable appearance. The body is robust and stocky, with a slightly protruding belly and thick limbs, typical of a panda's physique. The fur appears dense and soft, suggesting a plush, tactile surface. This animal would be a striking presence in an urban park or zoo setting, drawing attention due to its iconic coloration and posture.
description: A standing giant panda with a robust body, black and white fur, and distinctive black eye patches. The animal's upright posture and plush appearance make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the panda's profile, with its head, rounded ears, and black-and-white fur pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad back, rounded ears, and the symmetrical black and white fur distribution.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with the same distinctive markings and upright stance.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the panda's face, black eye patches, rounded ears, and the full width of its chest and belly.
